creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to solidwarea from comment #15)

It's still open. I had been on the road but strated looking yesterday amongst other things.  I checked diffs between 14.1 and 14.2 to see if I could spot anything.  The fact from comment 10 that it also happens on main made it more complicated as drivers are different between 14 and main;  so likely is elsewhere in the code.
